ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "size_range_us" TEXT /* Size range in the US standard */,
  "size_range_eu" TEXT /* Size range in the EU standard */,
  "size_range_uk" TEXT /* Size range in the UK standard */,
  "size_range_asia" TEXT /* Size range in the Asian standard */,
  "size_range_intl" TEXT /* Size range in the international standard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement set */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated size */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the measurements are defined */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range in inches */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range in inches */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement range in inches */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement range in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement range in inches */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement range in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion rule */,
  "from_region_id" INTEGER /* Region ID of the original size standard */,
  "to_region_id" INTEGER /* Region ID of the target size standard */,
  "size_equivalence" TEXT /* Equivalence in the target size standard */,
  "conversion_type" TEXT /* Type of conversion (e.g., US to EU, EU to UK) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the conversion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_to_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_from_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferred_region_id" INTEGER /* Preferred region for size standard */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the customer in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer's measurement set */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement in inches */,
  "date_measured" TEXT /* Date when the measurements were taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Recommended size ID */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region for which the recommendation is made */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the recommendation */,
  "date_recommended" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Associated size ID */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the inventory is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., T-Shirt, Jeans) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is designed */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the product is designed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size ID of the sold item */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the sale occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Size ID the customer provided feedback on */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the size recommendation (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment from the customer */,
  "date_provided" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product for which the feedback was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
